title: pogonospermum laetum
intro: Pogonospermum laetum, also known as the 'laetum', is a type of flowering plant within the Rutaceae family, which is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are due to the presence of compounds like limonene and beta-pinene. The health benefits of Pogonospermum laetum include its potential in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Pogonospermum laetum is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in traditional medicine preparations like tinctures and ointments.
